claims.text: 1. A method for treating opiate addiction in a human in need thereof, comprising subcutaneously implanting at least one implantable device comprising buprenorphine and ethylene vinyl acetate copolymer...

indications.text:
PROBUPHINE is indicated for the maintenance treatment of opioid dependence in patients who
have achieved and sustained prolonged clinical stability on low-to-moderate doses of a
transmucosal buprenorphine-containing product (i.e., doses of no more than 8 mg per day of
Subutex or Suboxone sublingual ...
